summary: Created the US-843 AI decision QA design document at docs/test-design/us-843-ai-decisions.md. Spexus current_context was read before the task and epic hierarchy. The design aligns to the current chooseAiAction/getLegalActions/GameState surfaces, defines deterministic executable scenarios for bidding, contract ordering, discard, whist, all-pass, misere, trick play, continuation states, and stuck diagnostics, and maps them back to PERSONAL-REQ-1758, PERSONAL-REQ-1759, PERSONAL-AC-2424, PERSONAL-AC-2425, and PERSONAL-STD-063. Dependency evidence from the US-842 completion gate and MZ-208 release gate was reviewed. Minimal docs-only verification confirmed the new document and final report exist and are readable.

tests_run.evidence: Readable final task report check succeeded.
Header and opening sections rendered correctly from the written document.

downstream_notes: Current src/ai/heuristicAi.ts still contains a simple fallback to the first legal action, so several phase-context scenarios in this design are intended to be picked up by MZ-302/MZ-303 when they implement stronger heuristics and regression coverage.

Some scenario details call for narrow phase-specific fixtures beyond the current helper set in src/domain/engine.test.ts and src/test/integrationHarness.ts; MZ-302/MZ-303 should add those test-only fixtures without changing production rules/UI code.

verification_environment.notes: Per task instructions, no npm run verify was needed because the work was documentation-only and no production/test code was changed.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Relies on task execution order and recorded report metadata rather than an independent external audit.
Dependency reports informed test-design scope and readiness only; this task did not rerun implementation verification.
This gate verifies documentation completeness and actionability, not runtime AI behavior.
quality_gate_matrix.accepted_risk: Runtime behavior remains for MZ-302/MZ-303 to implement and verify.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Observability expectations are specified but not yet enforced by automated tests in this task.
quality_gate_matrix.accepted_risk: Instrumentation and failure-payload assertions are deferred to the follow-up implementation and regression tasks.

quality_gate_matrix.command_or_source: PERSONAL-TASK-1147 scope; PERSONAL-EP-180 hierarchy; docs-only deliverable
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: No auth, backend, network, or sensitive data path exists in this task scope.
Verification was intentionally minimal because no production or test code changed.
This task contributes release-gate test design only and does not by itself satisfy the US-843 release gate.
quality_gate_matrix.accepted_risk: US-843 remains dependent on later implementation and regression tasks.
